---
title: "ConvolvedDistributions.jl"
description: "Convolve probability distributions, with shared numerical quadrature."
categories: [distributions, convolution]
status: experimental
---

Sums of random delays — for example an incubation period followed by a
reporting delay — are convolutions of their distributions. ConvolvedDistributions.jl
convolves any `Distributions.jl` distributions and takes differences between
them, sharing a common quadrature so the numerics stay consistent across the
ecosystem.

## Install

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("ConvolvedDistributions")
```

## Links

- [Documentation ↗](https://convolveddistributions.epiaware.org/dev/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/EpiAware/ConvolvedDistributions.jl)
